name: stripe-integration
description: Specialised pipeline for Stripe/payment work. Critic focuses on PCI DSS compliance and webhook security. Gate 4 human approval is mandatory for all financial logic changes.
use_when: Stripe payment intents, webhook handlers, subscriptions, refunds, Stripe Elements UI
criticFocusOverride: stripe-signature MUST be validated via stripe.webhooks.constructEvent() before ANY processing
No raw card data touches the server — Stripe tokenization only (PCI DSS Level 1)
Payment intents MUST use idempotency keys
Webhook handler MUST be idempotent — duplicate events must be safe to replay
All financial logic changes require Gate 4 human approval (CLAUDE.md Section 2 Gate 4)
Test with: stripe trigger payment_intent.succeeded && stripe trigger payment_intent.payment_failed
examples: Add ticket submission payment intent flow
Handle payment_intent.succeeded webhook → update ticket status
Add refund flow for dismissed cases
